en: Auto End Turn When No AP
zh_CN: 无行动力时自动结束回合

en: Camera Pan: WASD / Middle Mouse Drag
zh_CN: 相机平移：WASD / 鼠标中键拖拽

en:
Your past has been written.
Are you ready to begin your journey?
zh_CN:
你的过往已经书写完毕。
准备好踏上旅途了吗？

en: STR {0}  DEX {1}  CON {2}  INT {3}  WIS {4}  CHA {5}
A gathering place for adventurers. Mercenaries of all kinds wait here for employers; pay the recruitment fee to add them to your party.
zh_CN: 冒险者的聚集地。形形色色的佣兵在此等待雇主，支付招募费即可加入队伍。

en: No mercenaries are available. Check again in a few days.
zh_CN: 暂无可招募的佣兵。过几天再来看看。

en: Recruit Fee: {0} gold | Weekly Wage: {1} gold
Recruitment failed (not enough gold or party is full)
zh_CN: 招募失败（金币不足或队伍已满）

en: An experienced smith can repair and strengthen your equipment. The forge burns bright and hammer blows ring through the room.
zh_CN: 经验丰富的铁匠可以帮你修理和强化装备。炉火通明，铁锤声不绝于耳。

en: Full Repair ({0} gold) -- restore all equipment durability
zh_CN: 全副修理 ({0}金) -- 恢复所有装备耐久

en: Sharpen Weapon ({0} gold) -- leader main-hand weapon damage +1 permanently
zh_CN: 磨砺武器 ({0}金) -- 队长主手武器伤害永久+1

en: Reinforce Armor ({0} gold) -- leader body armor DR threshold +1 permanently
zh_CN: 加固防具 ({0}金) -- 队长身甲装甲阈值永久+1

en: The apothecary's craft can heal wounds and cleanse evil. The fragrance of herbs fills the room.
zh_CN: 药师的力量可以治愈伤痛，净化邪恶。炉中草药的清香弥漫整个房间。

en: Minor Healing ({0} gold) -- restore party HP to at least 50%
zh_CN: 轻度治疗 ({0}金) -- 全队生命至少恢复至50%

en: Major Healing ({0} gold) -- restore party HP to 100%
zh_CN: 深度治疗 ({0}金) -- 恢复全队100%生命值

en: Purify Curse ({0} gold) -- remove all negative effects
zh_CN: 净化诅咒 ({0}金) -- 移除所有负面状态

en: Buy Purification Potion ({0} gold) -- add to inventory
zh_CN: 购买净化药水 ({0}金) -- 加入背包

en: Not enough gold to buy a purification potion.
zh_CN: 金币不足，无法购买净化药水。

en: Obtained Purification Potion x1. Added to inventory.
zh_CN: 获得净化药水 x1，已放入背包。

en: Unpaid wages: the party cannot recover!
Wait {0} hours in town. Recovery multiplier x{1} (town bonus).
zh_CN: 在城内等待 {0} 小时，恢复倍率 x{1}（城内加成）。
等待 {0} 小时（城内恢复 x{1}）

en: Waited {0} hours. Town recovery x{1} applied.
zh_CN: 等待 {0} 小时结束，城内恢复 x{1}。

en: Marshal {0} is leading an army toward {1}. Join the march?
zh_CN: {0} 元帅正率领军团，目标: {1}。是否加入随军前行？

en:
Enable tutorial prompts?

Tutorials appear as floating panels at key moments,
helping you learn controls, systems, and world lore.
You can disable them later in Settings.
zh_CN:
是否开启教程提示？

教程会在游戏关键节点以悬浮面板形式出现，
帮助你了解操作、设定和世界观。
你可以随时在设置中关闭。

en: Lords post bounties and commissions here. Complete quests to earn gold and reputation.
zh_CN: 领主发布的悬赏委托。完成任务可获得金币和声望奖励。

en: No commissions are available. Check again in a few days.
zh_CN: 暂无可接取的委托。过几天再来看看。

en: Claim failed: reward does not exist or has already been claimed.
zh_CN: 领取失败：奖励不存在或已领取。
